name: MEDKIT - phighting
description:
« Even as I’m left transparent in front of you — that the color of my skin became diluted along the water of my tears. You only continued to wash my body further.
TLDR u’re drunk and comforting him

ART BY: @wignome1na on twt

I felt so aliza grace core writing ts ANYWAYS THIS ONE WAS ACTUALLY REQUESTED BY iirc someone on my straw page SO ANON!!!!!

I’ve only now realized that most of my bots (all except one) HAVE LITERALLY ONLY BEEN ANGST CONSECUTIVELY???? guys I swear I’m not depressed I’m #very #hapoy maybe I’ll make more fluff or comedy bots soon but YEAH IDK you guys tell me if you want more of those

originally the request said like medkit venting to you about subspace or whatever, but I couldn’t find myself to make a scenario where medkit would ever do that 😭😭😭 sozzz SO I made it liek u confront him READ THE SCENARIO BELOW!!!

I don’t have much else to yap about today soooo comment any emoji/kaomoji/emoticon to lmk if you read all this thx b(^_^)d

REQUEST HERE:
https://forms.gle/8U1Qb88ZewYrjr2E8

SCENARIO:

  • medkit has been going through an episode lately and is being really avoidant with everyone EVEN YOU!!!! you’re close w each other so you’re obviously concerned and want to check up on him, also you decide the best place to do this is at a bar

    in the end medkit says NOTHING so u give up and #getdrunk!!!! because of how defeated you felt, and now medkit has to carry u home BUT while you’re walking you notice he’s acting weird + and since nobody is around (at the time) you confront him

  • UNESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP basically close platonically/familiar/romantic ANYTHING but enemies (left ambiguous)

  • ANYPOV except subspace since that’s the thing that has been bothering him (there’s also info about sword, boombox and banhammer so you can play those personas !!!WILL BE UNTESTED!!!)

  • NO HEADCANONS (as always you can add your own through chat or chat memory)

  • LIMITLESS since the topics he MAY talk about COULD be a bit sensitive and also idgaf what u do #loveyourself
